'''Pelagia Province''' was a section of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] ruled by [[House Pelagia]]. The systems [[Betolio system/Legends|Betolio]], [[Dampher system/Legends|Dampher]], [[Grella system/Legends|Grella]], [[Lorenz system/Legends|Lorenz]], [[Kamper system/Legends|Kamper]], [[New Javis system/Legends|New Javis]], [[Setolio system/Legends|Setolio]] and [[Netolio system/Legends|Netolio]] were in the Pelagia Province before they were ceded to [[House Calipsa]] after the [[Mecetti Purge]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] the province contained three systems and two inhabitable worlds.

The [[Shapani Bypass]] was the fastest hyper-route to [[Cadriaan Province|Cadriaan]] and was controlled by House Pelagia. Pelagia ensured that its enemies, including [[House Calipsa]], paid high tariffs for passing through. At one time Calipsa was banned from Pelagian space and therefore isolated from the Shapani Run.
